final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical instructional illustration showing step-by-step deployment of hermes inside a docker container with glmcodingplan integration.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical step-by-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker environment setup / container initialization
  Step 2: hermes installation and configuration inside the container
  Step 3: glmcodingplan integration and connection
  Step 4: verification / running confirmation
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical / developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (bold, prominent), "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must contain a diagram or icon illustrating the action
Avoid:
